spec.name: Mind Counter Sphere
spec.summary: disrupts mind energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that disrupts mind energy in a spherical envelope with active regulation while it runs. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: timed long.
